linked to Medicare claims data, the date of birth from the Medicare 
enrollment files was used. If the beneficiary was linked to Medicaid claims data, but not Medicare 
claims data, the date of birth from the Medicaid enrollment files was used. If the beneficiary was not 
linked to either Medicare or Medicaid claims data, the date of birth from the AHC screening and 
navigation data was used.
